name: Discovery Engine — Paper Extraction
tagline: Cross-domain scientific discovery through structured extraction of scientific publications
description: What one paper solves, another needs — but they're in different fields and will never cite each other. This skill extracts structured provides/requires relationships from scientific papers across arXiv, PubMed Central, OpenAlex, and OSTI, building a knowledge graph that surfaces hidden cross-domain connections. No API keys or external LLM needed — the agent is the extractor. Results are submitted as PRs to grow the open-access graph.
